CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Use GPS
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Determine position and speed via GPS

EditTextPreference.android:title: Split File Duration (minutes)
EditTextPreference.android:summary: How many minutes should one video file last?

ListPreference.android:title: Keep Temporary Videos For
ListPreference.android:summary: How long should temporary videos be stored?

Preference.android:title: SAVE Button
Preference.android:summary: Protects the current 10-minute fragment from being overwritten and moves it to the /saved folder.

Preference.android:title: START / STOP Button
Preference.android:summary: Starts or stops the background video recording.

Preference.android:title: GALLERY Button
Preference.android:summary: Opens the list of recorded videos (temp) and protected files (saved).

Preference.android:title: SETTINGS Button
Preference.android:summary: Opens application configuration, quality and focus settings.

Preference.android:title: EXIT Button
Preference.android:summary: Completely shuts down the application and background service.
Developer: Maja Szczepańska\naYamsz\nModern Android Dashcam Project
